prompt: Alpine ski lodge great room: a roaring stone fireplace, heavy timber beams, an antler chandelier, a frosted snow-view window, and a fur-draped hearth define a warm wooden retreat at dusk. Eye-level central arrival, continuous ceiling and plank floor, coherent close-range architecture, cozy amber firelight and cool window light, readable timber and stone materials. No haze, bloom, clipped whites, floating debris, text artifacts, or foreground obstruction. Photorealistic.
